evals.prompt: Navigate to https://example.com and take a screenshot of the page
evals.expected_output: The agent opens the URL using `agent-browser open`, verifies the page loaded, and takes a screenshot. Returns the screenshot file path.
assertions: The agent runs agent-browser open with the target URL
The agent takes a screenshot using agent-browser screenshot
The agent reports the screenshot file path

evals.prompt: Fill in a login form on https://example.com/login with email 'test@example.com' and password 'mypassword', then submit
evals.expected_output: The agent navigates to the login page, calls `agent-browser snapshot -i` to get element refs, fills the email and password fields using `agent-browser fill`, then clicks the submit button using `agent-browser click`.
assertions: The agent first navigates to the target URL
The agent takes an interactive snapshot to get element refs
The agent fills email and password fields using refs
The agent clicks the submit button using the correct ref

evals.prompt: Extract all links from https://example.com and save them to a file
evals.expected_output: The agent navigates to the page, runs `agent-browser snapshot` with appropriate flags to extract data, and writes the extracted links to a text file.
assertions: The agent navigates to the target URL
The agent extracts links using snapshot with --urls flag
The agent writes results to a file on disk

evals.prompt: Run a multi-step search flow: open duckduckgo.com, search for 'agent-browser npm', wait for results, and extract the first result link
evals.expected_output: The agent chains multiple commands: navigate to duckduckgo.com, find the search input via snapshot, fill the search term, press Enter, wait for results, snapshot again, and extract the first result link.
assertions: The agent navigates to the search engine
The agent fills the search input and submits
The agent waits for results to load
The agent extracts the first result link from the results page
